creator: anvimi@gmail.com
text:
Problem appeared in my RELENG_8 system with USB keyboard and can be repeated by reloading it after crash, hang up, power failure and so on.

Boot of the system stops in single user mode or in general mode at line "Password:" and anything could be typed with USB keyboard. But with PS/2 keyboard all OK.

I have line "console none unknown off insecure" in /etc/ttys.

Fix: 

Use PS/2 keyboard or boot from emergency CD, check file system and reboot.
How-To-Repeat: By reloading RELENG_8 system with USB keyboard after crash, hang up, power failure and so on.
